title: EU Seeks Android Access From Google For Rival AI Assistants
description: The EU is stepping up pressure on Google to open up its Android ecosystem to rival artificial intelligence assistants, marking a fresh escalation in the bloc’s ongoing regulatory push against Big Tech dominance. The move comes under the framework of the Digital Markets Act (DMA), which aims to ensure fair competition by preventing large technology platforms from favouring their own services
content:

title: US flags ‘AI copying’ by China, warns allies ahead of Xi-Trump meet
description: The US has stepped up its campaign against China in the field of artificial intelligence, warning countries about what it describes as attempts by Chinese firms to copy American technology.
content:

title: The Complete List Of Companies Slashing Jobs For AI
description: The decisions are being linked to many factors, including the growing role of artificial intelligence.
content: Major global companies are preparing for job cuts, with firms like Amazon, Meta and Oracle expected to trim thousands of roles. The decisions are being linked to many factors, including the growing role of artificial intelligence, changing economic c... [5730 chars]

title: ASL Industries Limited Rebrands as AVATAR Industries Limited, Pivots to Artificial Intelligence Segment
description: ASL Industries Limited has strategically rebranded to AVATAR Industries Limited on April 24, 2026, transitioning from traditional industrial operations to an AI-focused technology enterprise. The transformation targets the global digital transformation market projected to exceed USD 3 trillion and the AI sector expected to surpass USD 1 trillion by 2030. The company plans to develop capabilities in end-to-end software solutions, AI analytics, digital infrastructure, and consulting services to create scalable business models and diversified revenue streams for long-term shareholder value.
content: ASL Industries Limited has announced its strategic rebranding to AVATAR Industries Limited, marking a pivotal transformation from traditional industrial operations to an artificial intelligence-focused technology enterprise. The announcement, made on... [4163 chars]

title: OpenAI case narrows as Musk withdraws fraud allegations before key trial; here's what we know
description: At the heart of the dispute is Musk’s claim that OpenAI strayed from its founding mission. Co-founded in 2015 as a nonprofit, the organisation was intended to develop artificial intelligence for the benefit of humanity.
content: Elon Musk has withdrawn his fraud allegations against OpenAI and its co-founders Sam Altman and Greg Brockman, significantly narrowing a high-profile lawsuit just days before trial. A US federal court will now hear only two claims—unjust enrichment a... [3167 chars]

title: Domestic jobs market facing artificial intelligence ‘upheaval’, says Taoiseach
description: Micheál Martin’s comments come as Meta cuts 10% of global staff, about 8,000 workers
content:
The Government is bracing for possible turbulence in the Republic’s tech sector as artificial intelligence (AI) threatens to cause “significant upheaval” to large parts of the Irish workforce in the coming years.

title: Banks’ steady support key to growth: Finance minister Nirmala Sitharaman
description: The finance minister called for greater adaptability in the banking system in response to rapid advances in artificial intelligence, citing emerging risks from next-generation models such as Claude Mythos that can identify and exploit software vulnerabilities faster than human experts
content:
Finance minister Nirmala Sitharaman has underscored the need for banks to provide “predictable support” to sustain India’s consumption-driven growth amid rising global uncertainties.

title: Artificial Intelligence will bore us to death before it kills us
description: Before the world ends, Artificial Intelligence poses another grave threat to humanity: it risks boring us to death

title: AI united Sam Altman and Elon Musk, then drove them apart
description: Elon Musk and Sam Altman, co-founders of OpenAI, are set to face off in court over a clash of visions regarding artificial intelligence. Their initial collaboration, driven by a shared concern for AI's future, has fractured due to differing approaches to its development and commercialization.

title: Wall Street Week Ahead: Soaring US stocks face pivotal week of tech-led earnings, Fed meeting
description: Indian markets brace for a crucial week. Major tech giants like Microsoft and Alphabet report earnings. Investors watch for clues on artificial intelligence spending. The U.S. Federal Reserve meets, with potential changes at its helm. Economic growth and inflation data will also be released. Geopolitical tensions in the Middle East remain a key concern for asset prices.
